name.en-US: Structured workflow readiness review — Security Alert Triage Copilot

description.en-US: Learner demonstrated ability to prioritize a formatting or data quality issue in a structured workflow record, submit a defensible readiness decision, and ask a manager-level follow-up question that names workflow dependency and accountability.

name.en-US: Why Data Formatting Matters: A Manager's Guide to Structured Information

success_criteria.notes: Success requires DO artifact rubric pass AND quiz mastery. Quiz score alone does not produce result.success true.

do_rubric_threshold.partial_credit_insufficient: Naming last_reviewed null without automation or formatting consequence does not pass prioritized_issue.

evidence_artifact.description: Learner-submitted readiness review of the Security Alert Triage Copilot structured record.
expected_contents: Highest-priority formatting or data quality issue with business consequence
Readiness decision (Expand / Continue pilot only / Hold)
Manager-level follow-up question naming workflow dependency and accountability

prioritized_issue.pass: Identifies non-trivial conflict or formatting problem with stated business consequence
prioritized_issue.fail: Only names null last_reviewed or other single blank field without consequence analysis

readiness_decision_valid.pass: Decision (Expand / Continue pilot only / Hold) aligns with stated rationale and record evidence
readiness_decision_valid.fail: Decision contradicts rationale or ignores visible automation risk

follow_up_question.pass: Specific question naming workflow dependency and accountable role or owner
follow_up_question.fail: Generic handoff to IT or syntax-focused question

name.en-US: Structured workflow readiness review — Security Alert Triage Copilot

description.en-US: Learner demonstrated ability to prioritize a formatting or data quality issue in a structured workflow record, submit a defensible readiness decision, and ask a manager-level follow-up question that names workflow dependency and accountability.

name.en-US: Why Data Formatting Matters: A Manager's Guide to Structured Information

result.response: Who must approve changes to escalation rules before a high-severity disable_account recommendation can run with human_review_required false, and what timestamp format will Security Operations require in alert intake before this workflow scales?

extensions.https://hackademic.solutions/xapi/extens: Auto-escalation is enabled without human review while the sample alert recommends disable_account at high severity and status remains pilot.
auto_escalate_enabled is true and human_review_required is false while recommended_action is disable_account for a high-severity alert; event_time is not machine-readable.
Structured data is more reliable for AI, automation, reporting, and governance than ambiguous notes.

review_notes: This is an xAPI-ready statement template only. tracking_status is template_only_not_connected_to_lrs.
result.success requires do_rubric_pass AND quiz mastery (>= 4/5). Quiz-only completion is insufficient.
Confirm final activity object URL before implementation.
Confirm whether evidence artifact is stored in Skool, LMS, repository, or separate assessment system.
Validate extension URLs before production use.
